taskTitle: Study the meaning and conditions of La ilaha illAllah
subtaskTitle: Study the linguistic meaning of La ilaha illAllah
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Study the linguistic meaning of La ilaha illAllah' under the parent task 'Study the meaning and conditions of La ilaha illAllah' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: Identify primary Quranic verses, specifically 47:19 and 43:26-27, that anchor the linguistic structure of negation (Nafi) and affirmation (Ithbat) inherent in the declaration of "La ilaha illAllah."
Retrieve Sahih hadith from Bukhari and Muslim, such as narrations regarding the "Kalima" as the key to Paradise, that directly define the primary-source linguistic meaning of "La ilaha illAllah."
